name: get-design-done
description: Agent-orchestrated 5-stage design pipeline: Scan → Discover → Plan → Design → Verify. 14 specialized agents, 7 connections (Figma, Refero, Preview, Storybook, Chromatic, Figma Writer, Graphify), and 5 standalone commands (style, darkmode, compare, figma-write, graphify). Embeds NNG heuristics, WCAG thresholds, typographic systems, motion framework, and anti-pattern catalog.
